total_eur: 50

project: Hearthline
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: Zigbee door sensors
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 36
  - item: AAA rechargeable set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 14
    line_eur: 14
---

function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, read inbox-processing/OCR/migration/schema docs, preserved existing note bodies, kept edits focused, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Juniper. Searching purchases found three Juniper-related bill records, and each visible note body contained all required bill fields and line items needed by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. I added YAML frontmatter to the three bill files and then deleted the inbox file per the process-next-inbox and inbox v2 workflows.
